name: shortcut-slack-autoposter
description: * Use Slash command in Slack, provide the link to the card that has been sent through * This will call the Shortcut API, and retrieve card details     * Card title, customer's email and ID, importance etc. * Format the card details into readable slack message.     * e.g. Feature | 31937 | Jupiter | someone@example.com |  Add support to show icons on tabs with active shipments in them {link-to-card} * Post message in #feature-requests channel
